{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260322193531C131CC09E28E3EB998E5\"}"},"total":46},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7004100054501163783","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这么好的书咋看的人这么少呢？热度太低了啊！而且作者还会与你互动，太赞了啊！就是感情线有点复杂，个人比较喜欢武，她的形象塑造的很好"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1630769128,"group_id":"6914210148453977095","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"可能写书的时间不够，脑子里大概有个构思，还没开始写","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxIziVmXd2v0HJQ0R0N/SZrR3+zZvzmBHcNPs4jgKP4L","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/2ed64fb7471a4894bed0ce9bbe57b81a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776704343\u0026x-signature=7wgw4aVIOMf4Hevf8BRPGFhogWw%3D","user_id":"2991142630852861","user_name":"作者giygbi"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2991142630852861","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{\"title_name\":\"作家\",\"title_id\":\"author\"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{\"title_text\":\"作家\",\"title_default_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"title_dark_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"bg_default_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#FF9F31\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#FFB95C\\\"}\",\"bg_dark_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#CC8029\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#CC9349\\\"}\",\"title_dark_diaphaneity\":\"CC\"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6914210148453977095","book_info":{"abstract":"在获得了全国高中篮球冠军后的苏丛由于个人成绩太差和父亲工作调动的原因，意外的转学至上一年自己击败过的学校并降级一年，在改名之后开始了新的生活，最后以新的身份新的生活，重拾篮球梦，与一群老对手及新队友一起重新追逐全国冠军。迎接而来的将是更强的各路对手和一段段扑朔迷离的感情故事","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.co
